context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 - Daily Report Export features verified. Key fixes working: (1) Summary mode API now returns ALL 22 paddy entry fields (kg, qntl, bags, g_deposite, gbw_cut, mill_w, moisture, moisture_cut, cutting_percent, disc_dust_poll, final_w, plastic_bag, p_pkt_cut, g_issued, cash_paid, diesel_paid - previously only returned 4 fields), (2) Pump Account uses 'mandi' key instead of 'agent' in both API response and Excel exports, (3) Excel has 20 column headers for paddy entries from Truck through Diesel.
